title: platanthera orbiculata f. pauciflora
intro: Platanthera orbiculata f. pauciflora, also known as the lesser purple fringed orchid, is a rare and unique subspecies of orchid native to the southwestern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the lesser purple fringed orchid is typically dried and made into a tea or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
